headline: ₹50-200 Cr (routine capex, not at risk) — JSW Energy commissions 85 MW renewable capacity, reinforcing green transition but with limited immediate P&L impact
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD, EU Taxonomy frameworks; routine disclosure, no penalty risk.
No material P/E rerating; negligible margin or revenue impact at current scale.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital via green financing; no immediate bond spread change.
